name: geo-gap-finder
description: Marketplace hosting the geo-gap-finder Claude Code plugin — a live-data GEO opportunity finder.

plugins.name: geo-gap-finder
plugins.description: Find the AI-search prompts your product can actually win — deep GEO research that profiles your product, discovers real long-tail prompts, runs live ChatGPT citation diagnosis, and ranks the gaps into an opportunity matrix. Grounded in live Bright Data scrapes; no hallucinated metrics.
